_note: PHASE 0 - LIVE calibration. A single gorgo-2d fleet drives production-representative load (c=64, L40S:2 x3 regions). The proxy forwards upstream to SGLang /generate so per-request meta_info (queue_time, prefill_waiting_latency, prefill_launch_latency, cached_tokens) is emitted, and accumulates pooled physical rates live: prefill_rate = prefill_launch_latency_ms / uncached, queue_rate = (queue_time + prefill_waiting_latency)_ms / queued_tokens_at_dispatch. The sequencer harvests the converged pooled rates and patches them into the tuning + eval phases. Window: apr5 16:15-16:45 (decoded high-diversity).

auto_tune._note: calibrate mode: accumulate pooled prefill_rate/queue_rate from /generate meta_info as requests complete; does NOT modify live weights (apply=false). Sequencer reads the converged rates from the proxy at phase end.
